remittance.title: Send Money
remittance.howToPay: How would you like to pay?
remittance.howToReceive: How should they receive the money?

requote.title: Rate Updated
requote.subtitle: The exchange rate changed by {{deltaPercent}} while your transfer was being submitted. Please review and confirm.
requote.warningWorsened: The new rate is less favourable. The recipient will receive slightly less ETB. You can cancel at no cost.
requote.cancelConfirm: This will cancel your transfer. Your funds have not been debited.
requote.errorGeneric: Unable to process your confirmation. Please try again.
requote.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
requote.disclaimer: By confirming, you accept the updated exchange rate. The final ETB amount may vary slightly at settlement.

pendingLiquidity.title: Transfer Queued
pendingLiquidity.subtitle: Our payout partners are temporarily at capacity. Your funds are safe and have been returned to your account.
pendingLiquidity.explanation: All our payout partners are at their maximum transfer capacity for this amount. This is a temporary situation — partners typically restore capacity within 30 minutes. Your transfer details are saved and you can retry at no extra cost.
pendingLiquidity.countdownNote: Retry button activates when the window ends
pendingLiquidity.cancelConfirm: This will permanently cancel this transfer attempt. You can always start a new transfer.
pendingLiquidity.stillPendingMessage: Transfer partners are still at capacity. Please try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
pendingLiquidity.retryErrorGeneric: Could not retry the transfer. Please try again.
pendingLiquidity.disclaimer: Your funds are safe. Sumsuma does not hold your money — your balance has already been restored.

auth.phoneHint: Enter your Ethiopian mobile number (9 digits)
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.secureFooter: Secure Services for the Ethiopian Diaspora
auth.sendCodeFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.
auth.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
auth.enterEmailForReset: Please enter your email address to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: A password reset link has been sent to your email.

insights.title: Insights
insights.startTransacting: Start making transactions to see your insights

kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete KYC to unlock all features
kyc.selectDocumentDesc: Choose the type of ID document you'll use for verification
kyc.personalInfoDesc: Enter your details exactly as they appear on your document
kyc.uploadDocumentDesc: Take clear photos of your document
kyc.takeSelfieDesc: We need a photo of you to verify your identity
kyc.successMessage: KYC verification submitted! We will review your documents within 24-48 hours.
kyc.verifiedMessage: Your identity has been verified. You have full access to all features.
kyc.pendingMessage: Your documents are being reviewed. This usually takes 24-48 hours.

familyWallet.title: Family Wallet
familyWallet.subtitle: Manage support for your family in Ethiopia
familyWallet.name: Full Name
familyWallet.sendConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to send support to {{name}}?
familyWallet.deleteMsg: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your family wallet?
familyWallet.budgetWarning: Your total monthly support exceeds your budget limit.
familyWallet.emptyMessage: Start supporting your family more easily by adding your first family member.

familyRequest.title: Family Requests
familyRequest.createSubtitle: Request financial support from your family abroad
familyRequest.payoutFailed: Request approved but payout failed. Please contact support.
familyRequest.alreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed.
familyRequest.offlineAction: This action is not available while offline. Please try again when connected.
familyRequest.offlineBanner: You are viewing in read-only mode. Connect to take action.
familyRequest.emptyMessage: When family members request support, it will appear here.
familyRequest.infoNote: Your request will be sent to your family member abroad. They can approve or decline it.

recurringSupport.title: Recurring Support
recurringSupport.subtitle: Automate payments to your family members
recurringSupport.emptyMessage: Set up automated payments for your family members by adding your first schedule.
recurringSupport.cancelMsg: Are you sure you want to cancel this recurring schedule?

familyCircle.title: Family Circle
familyCircle.subtitle: Pool together to support family members
familyCircle.contributeMsg: Confirm your contribution to this circle?
familyCircle.emptyMessage: Create your first family circle to start pooling support together.
familyCircle.allContributed: All members have contributed. Send payout to beneficiary?

supportCampaign.title: Support Campaigns
supportCampaign.subtitle: Fundraise for those in need
supportCampaign.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this campaign?
supportCampaign.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this campaign...
supportCampaign.emptyMessage: Be the first to create a support campaign for someone in need.

funding.title: Add Funds
funding.subtitle: Choose how to top up your wallet
funding.bankTransferInstructions: Transfer funds to the account details below. Your wallet will be credited within 1–3 business days.
funding.bankProcessingNote: Bank transfers typically take 1–3 business days to be credited.
funding.bankSecureNote: All bank details are encrypted and handled by licensed financial partners.
funding.comingSoonSub: This payment method will be available soon.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your multi-currency wallet
wallet.emptyActivityMessage: Your wallet activity will appear here once you make transactions.

transparentFX.title: Transparent FX
transparentFX.subtitle: See exactly what you pay — no hidden fees, no surprises
transparentFX.noHiddenFeesDesc: What you see is what you pay. Our fee structure is fully transparent with no surprise charges.
transparentFX.midMarketFeeDesc: We use the mid-market exchange rate and add a simple 1.5% conversion fee. That's it.
transparentFX.partnerDisclaimerDesc: All currency conversions are processed by licensed financial institutions in Ethiopia.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyMessage: You're all caught up! Notifications about your transactions, transfers, and account activity will appear here.
notifications.pushDeniedSub: Enable notifications in Settings to receive transfer updates

sendAgain.noTransfersSub: Send your first support to your family in Ethiopia

referral.title: Refer a Friend
referral.subtitle: Earn 100 ETB for each friend who joins!
referral.step1Desc: Send your referral code or link to friends
referral.step2Desc: Your friend signs up using your code
referral.step3Desc: You get 100 ETB and your friend gets 50 ETB!
referral.shareMessage:
Join Sumsuma and get 100 ETB bonus! Use my referral code: {{code}}

Download now: {{link}}
referral.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address
referral.termsText: Referral rewards are credited after your friend completes their first transaction. Both parties must have verified accounts. Sumsuma reserves the right to modify or cancel the referral program at any time. Rewards are processed by our licensed financial partners.

legal.disclaimer: Sumsuma is a technology platform. Money services are provided by licensed financial institutions in Ethiopia.
legal.fundsDisclaimer: Funds are processed by licensed financial institutions in Ethiopia.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorComingSoon: Two-factor authentication will be available in a future update.
security.tip1: Use a strong, unique password for your account
security.tip2: Enable biometric authentication for quick and secure access
security.tip3: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for financial transactions
security.tip4: Regularly review your login activity for suspicious access

admin.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this dispute?

treasury.releaseConfirm: Release this reservation and return funds to the available pool?
treasury.markSettledConfirm: Confirm this settlement obligation has been cleared with the partner?

settlementEngine.subtitle: Track obligations, batches, and partner settlements
settlementEngine.processConfirm: Initiate settlement wire for this batch?
settlementEngine.settleConfirm: Mark this batch as settled? This cannot be undone.
settlementEngine.failConfirm: Mark this batch as failed? Obligations will revert to OPEN.
settlementEngine.runSchedulerConfirm: Manually trigger the daily settlement scheduler? This will batch open obligations, detect overdue items, and run reconciliation for all providers.

schedulerRuns.noExecutions: No execution records for this run.

schedulerHistory.title: Scheduler Run History

schedulerHistory.scheduleInfo: 02:00 UTC – Daily settlement  •  03:00 UTC – Reconciliation  •  Hourly – Overdue detection
